variants.title: HiFi Filter SAM 5322 Filtering Mass
variants.description: Genuine HiFi Filter SAM 5322 Filtering Mass. Easy to install and replace, the SAM 5322 is built to withstand demanding environments, offering long-lasting protection and reliability. Whether used in automotive, agricultural, construction, or industrial applications, this filter is an essential component for maintaining system health and performance.
specifications: Style: FILTERING MASS, Dimension 1 (D1): 150.0 mm, Dimension 2 (D2): 50.0 mm, Height 1 (H1): 80.0 mm
